reports.title: Guide
reports.query:
This report provides impact analysis for CRF library components.

**Item Impact Analysis**
- Select an Item and Version to see:
  - All ItemGroups that reference this Item
  - All Forms that contain these ItemGroups
  - Collections where these Forms are used
  - Full dependency chain showing impact
    
**ItemGroup Impact Analysis**
- Select an ItemGroup and Version to see:
  - All Items that are part of this ItemGroup
  - All Forms that reference this ItemGroup
  - Collections where these Forms are used
  - Potential downstream impact of changes

**Form Impact Analysis**
- Select a Form and Version to see:
  - All ItemGroups that are part of this Form
  - All Items within those ItemGroups
  - Collections where this Form is used
  - Potential downstream impact of changes


This report helps users understand the ripple effect of changes across the CRF library structure.

reports.title: Select Item
reports.query:
MATCH (n:`OdmItemValue`) 
WHERE toLower(toString(n.`oid`)) CONTAINS toLower($input) 
RETURN DISTINCT n.`oid` as value,  n.`name` as display ORDER BY size(toString(value)) ASC LIMIT 1000

reports.title: Select Item Version
reports.query:
MATCH (item:OdmItemValue)<-[item_version:HAS_VERSION]-(item_root:OdmItemRoot)
WHERE item.oid = $neodash_odmitemvalue_oid_impact
RETURN item_version.version as value, 'Version ' + item_version.version as display
ORDER BY item_version.version DESC

reports.title: Item Details
reports.query:
MATCH (item:OdmItemValue)<-[item_version:HAS_VERSION]-(item_root:OdmItemRoot)
WHERE item.oid = $neodash_odmitemvalue_oid_impact 
  AND item_version.version = $neodash_item_version_impact
OPTIONAL MATCH (item)-[:HAS_DESCRIPTION]->(desc:OdmDescription)
OPTIONAL MATCH (item)-[:HAS_CODELIST_TERM]->(:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->(:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(codelist:CTCodelistTerm)
WITH item, item_version, desc, collect(DISTINCT codelist.submission_value) AS codelists
RETURN 
  item.oid AS `Item OID`,
  item.name AS `Item Name`,
  item_version.version AS Version,
  item.data_type AS `Data Type`,
  item.length AS Length,
  item.significant_digits AS `Significant Digits`,
  CASE WHEN size(codelists) > 0 THEN apoc.text.join(codelists, '; ') ELSE null END AS `Codelist Terms`,
  desc.text AS Description

reports.title: ItemGroups using Item - $neodash_odmitemvalue_oid_impact (v $neodash_item_version_impact)
reports.query:
MATCH (item:OdmItemValue)<-[item_version:HAS_VERSION]-(item_root:OdmItemRoot)
WHERE item.oid = $neodash_odmitemvalue_oid_impact 
  AND item_version.version = $neodash_item_version_impact
OPTIONAL MATCH (group_root:OdmItemGroupRoot)-[group_version:HAS_VERSION]->(group:OdmItemGroupValue)-[item_ref:ITEM_REF]->(item)
OPTIONAL MATCH (group)-[:HAS_SDTM_DOMAIN]->(:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->(:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(domain:CTCodelistTerm)
RETURN 
  group.oid AS `ItemGroup OID`,
  group.name AS `ItemGroup Name`,
  group_version.version AS `ItemGroup Version`,
  domain.submission_value AS `SDTM Domain`,
  item_ref.mandatory AS `Mandatory in Group`,
  item_ref.order_number AS `Order in Group`
ORDER BY `ItemGroup Name`, `ItemGroup Version` DESC

settings.noDataMessage: Select an Item and Version above

reports.title: Forms using Item - $neodash_odmitemvalue_oid_impact  (v $neodash_item_version_impact)
reports.query:
MATCH (item:OdmItemValue)<-[item_version:HAS_VERSION]-(item_root:OdmItemRoot)
WHERE item.oid = $neodash_odmitemvalue_oid_impact 
  AND item_version.version = $neodash_item_version_impact
OPTIONAL MATCH (form_root:OdmFormRoot)-[form_version:HAS_VERSION]->(form:OdmFormValue)-[:ITEM_GROUP_REF]->(group:OdmItemGroupValue)-[:ITEM_REF]->(item)
RETURN DISTINCT
  form.oid AS `Form OID`,
  form.name AS `Form Name`,
  form_version.version AS `Form Version`,
  group.name AS `Via ItemGroup`
ORDER BY `Form Name`, `Form Version` DESC

settings.noDataMessage: Select an Item and Version above

reports.title: Collections using Item - $neodash_odmitemvalue_oid_impact
reports.query:
MATCH (item:OdmItemValue)<-[item_version:HAS_VERSION]-(item_root:OdmItemRoot)
WHERE item.oid = $neodash_odmitemvalue_oid_impact 
  AND item_version.version = $neodash_item_version_impact
OPTIONAL MATCH (coll_root:OdmStudyEventRoot)-[coll_version:HAS_VERSION]->(coll:OdmStudyEventValue)-[:FORM_REF]->(form:OdmFormValue)-[:ITEM_GROUP_REF]->(group:OdmItemGroupValue)-[:ITEM_REF]->(item)
RETURN DISTINCT
  coll.name AS `Collection Name`,
  coll_version.version AS `Collection Version`,
  form.name AS `Via Form`,
  group.name AS `Via ItemGroup`
ORDER BY `Collection Name`, `Collection Version` DESC, `Via Form`

settings.noDataMessage: Select an Item and Version above

reports.title: Dependency Chain - $neodash_odmitemvalue_oid_impact  (v $neodash_item_version_impact)
reports.query:
MATCH (item:OdmItemValue)<-[item_version:HAS_VERSION]-(item_root:OdmItemRoot)
WHERE item.oid = $neodash_odmitemvalue_oid_impact 
  AND item_version.version = $neodash_item_version_impact

OPTIONAL MATCH (coll:OdmStudyEventValue)-[:FORM_REF]->(form:OdmFormValue)-[:ITEM_GROUP_REF]->(group:OdmItemGroupValue)-[:ITEM_REF]->(item)

WITH item, 
     coll.name AS coll_name,
     form.name AS form_name,
     group.name AS group_name

WITH item,
     collect(DISTINCT {coll: coll_name, form: form_name, grp: group_name}) AS chains

UNWIND chains AS chain

RETURN 
  chain.coll AS `Collection`,
  chain.form AS `→ Form`,
  chain.grp AS `→ ItemGroup`,
  item.name AS `→ Item (Selected)`
ORDER BY `Collection`, `→ Form`, `→ ItemGroup`
LIMIT 1000

settings.noDataMessage: Select an Item and Version above

reports.title: Impact Summary
reports.query:
MATCH (item:OdmItemValue)<-[item_version:HAS_VERSION]-(item_root:OdmItemRoot)
WHERE item.oid = $neodash_odmitemvalue_oid_impact 
  AND item_version.version = $neodash_item_version_impact

OPTIONAL MATCH (group:OdmItemGroupValue)-[:ITEM_REF]->(item)
WITH item, collect(DISTINCT group) AS groups

OPTIONAL MATCH (form:OdmFormValue)-[:ITEM_GROUP_REF]->(:OdmItemGroupValue)-[:ITEM_REF]->(item)
WITH item, groups, collect(DISTINCT form) AS forms

OPTIONAL MATCH (coll:OdmStudyEventValue)-[:FORM_REF]->(:OdmFormValue)-[:ITEM_GROUP_REF]->(:OdmItemGroupValue)-[:ITEM_REF]->(item)
WITH item, groups, forms, collect(DISTINCT coll) AS collections

RETURN 
  '# 🔹 Item Impact Analysis\n\n' +
  '## Item Information\n' +
  '- **Item OID**: ' + item.oid + '\n' +
  '- **Item Name**: ' + item.name + '\n' +
  '- **Version**: ' + toString($neodash_item_version_impact) + '\n' +
  '- **Data Type**: ' + coalesce(item.data_type, 'N/A') + '\n\n' +
  '---\n\n' +
  '## Impact Summary\n' +
  '- **ItemGroups Using This Item**: ' + toString(size(groups)) + '\n' +
  '- **Forms Affected**: ' + toString(size(forms)) + '\n' +
  '- **Collections Affected**: ' + toString(size(collections)) + '\n\n' +
  '---\n\n' +
  '## ⚠️ Change Impact\n' +
  'Any changes to this Item will potentially affect:\n' +
  '- ' + toString(size(groups)) + ' ItemGroup(s)\n' +
  '- ' + toString(size(forms)) + ' Form(s)\n' +
  '- ' + toString(size(collections)) + ' Collection(s)\n\n' +
  'This represents a **' + 
  CASE 
    WHEN size(forms) >= 5 THEN 'HIGH'
    WHEN size(formss) >= 2 THEN 'MEDIUM'
    ELSE 'LOW'
  END + '** impact level.'
  AS summary

reports.title: Select ItemGroup
reports.query:
MATCH (n:`OdmItemGroupValue`) 
WHERE toLower(toString(n.`oid`)) CONTAINS toLower($input) 
RETURN DISTINCT n.`oid` as value,  n.`name` as display ORDER BY size(toString(value)) ASC LIMIT 1000

reports.title: Select ItemGroup Version
reports.query:
MATCH (group:OdmItemGroupValue)<-[group_version:HAS_VERSION]-(group_root:OdmItemGroupRoot)
WHERE group.oid = $neodash_odmitemgroupvalue_oid_impact
RETURN group_version.version as value, 'Version ' + group_version.version as display
ORDER BY group_version.version DESC

reports.title: ItemGroup Details
reports.query:
MATCH (group:OdmItemGroupValue)<-[group_version:HAS_VERSION]-(group_root:OdmItemGroupRoot)
WHERE group.oid = $neodash_odmitemgroupvalue_oid_impact 
  AND group_version.version = $neodash_group_version_impact
OPTIONAL MATCH (group)-[:HAS_DESCRIPTION]->(desc:OdmDescription)
OPTIONAL MATCH (group)-[:HAS_SDTM_DOMAIN]->(domain_context:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->(:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(domain:CTCodelistTerm)
RETURN 
  group.oid AS `ItemGroup OID`,
  group.name AS `ItemGroup Name`,
  group_version.version AS Version,
  group.repeating AS Repeating,
  domain.submission_value AS `SDTM Domain`,
  desc.text AS Description

reports.title: Items in ItemGroup - $neodash_odmitemgroupvalue_oid_impact (v $neodash_group_version_impact)
reports.query:
MATCH (group:OdmItemGroupValue)<-[group_version:HAS_VERSION]-(group_root:OdmItemGroupRoot)
WHERE group.oid = $neodash_odmitemgroupvalue_oid_impact 
  AND group_version.version = $neodash_group_version_impact
OPTIONAL MATCH (group)-[item_ref:ITEM_REF]->(item:OdmItemValue)<-[item_version:HAS_VERSION]-(item_root:OdmItemRoot)
OPTIONAL MATCH (item)-[:HAS_DESCRIPTION]->(item_desc:OdmDescription)
OPTIONAL MATCH (item)-[:HAS_CODELIST_TERM]->(:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->(:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(codelist:CTCodelistTerm)
WITH item, item_version, item_desc, item_ref, collect(DISTINCT codelist.submission_value) AS codelists
ORDER BY item_ref.order_number
RETURN 
  item.oid AS `Item OID`,
  item.name AS `Item Name`,
  item_version.version AS Version,
  item.data_type AS `Data Type`,
  item_ref.mandatory AS Mandatory,
  item_ref.order_number AS `Order`,
  CASE WHEN size(codelists) > 0 THEN apoc.text.join(codelists, '; ') ELSE null END AS `Codelist Terms`,
  item_desc.text AS Description
ORDER BY `Order`

settings.noDataMessage: Select an ItemGroup and Version above

reports.title: Forms using ItemGroup - $neodash_odmitemgroupvalue_oid_impact (v $neodash_group_version_impact)
reports.query:
MATCH (group:OdmItemGroupValue)<-[group_version:HAS_VERSION]-(group_root:OdmItemGroupRoot)
WHERE group.oid = $neodash_odmitemgroupvalue_oid_impact 
  AND group_version.version = $neodash_group_version_impact
OPTIONAL MATCH (form_root:OdmFormRoot)-[form_version:HAS_VERSION]->(form:OdmFormValue)-[ig_ref:ITEM_GROUP_REF]->(group)
RETURN 
  form.oid AS `Form OID`,
  form.name AS `Form Name`,
  form_version.version AS `Form Version`,
  ig_ref.mandatory AS `Mandatory in Form`,
  ig_ref.order_number AS `Order in Form`
ORDER BY `Form Name`, `Form Version` DESC

settings.noDataMessage: Select an ItemGroup and Version above

reports.title: Collections using ItemGroup - $neodash_odmitemgroupvalue_oid_impact (v $neodash_group_version_impact)
reports.query:
MATCH (group:OdmItemGroupValue)<-[group_version:HAS_VERSION]-(group_root:OdmItemGroupRoot)
WHERE group.oid = $neodash_odmitemgroupvalue_oid_impact 
  AND group_version.version = $neodash_group_version_impact
OPTIONAL MATCH (coll_root:OdmStudyEventRoot)-[coll_version:HAS_VERSION]->(coll:OdmStudyEventValue)-[:FORM_REF]->(form:OdmFormValue)-[:ITEM_GROUP_REF]->(group)
RETURN DISTINCT
  coll.name AS `Collection Name`,
  coll_version.version AS `Collection Version`,
  form.name AS `Via Form`
ORDER BY `Collection Name`, `Collection Version` DESC, `Via Form`

settings.noDataMessage: Select an ItemGroup and Version above

reports.title: Impact Summary
reports.query:
MATCH (group:OdmItemGroupValue)<-[group_version:HAS_VERSION]-(group_root:OdmItemGroupRoot)
WHERE group.oid = $neodash_odmitemgroupvalue_oid_impact 
  AND group_version.version = $neodash_group_version_impact

OPTIONAL MATCH (group)-[:ITEM_REF]->(item:OdmItemValue)
WITH group, collect(DISTINCT item) AS items

OPTIONAL MATCH (form:OdmFormValue)-[:ITEM_GROUP_REF]->(group)
WITH group, items, collect(DISTINCT form) AS forms

OPTIONAL MATCH (coll:OdmStudyEventValue)-[:FORM_REF]->(:OdmFormValue)-[:ITEM_GROUP_REF]->(group)
WITH group, items, forms, collect(DISTINCT coll) AS collections

RETURN 
  '# 📦 ItemGroup Impact Analysis\n\n' +
  '## ItemGroup Information\n' +
  '- **ItemGroup OID**: ' + group.oid + '\n' +
  '- **ItemGroup Name**: ' + group.name + '\n' +
  '- **Version**: ' + toString($neodash_group_version_impact) + '\n\n' +
  '---\n\n' +
  '## Impact Summary\n' +
  '- **Items Affected**: ' + toString(size(items)) + '\n' +
  '- **Forms Using This ItemGroup**: ' + toString(size(forms)) + '\n' +
  '- **Collections Affected**: ' + toString(size(collections)) + '\n\n' +
  '---\n\n' +
  '## ⚠️ Change Impact\n' +
  'Any changes to this ItemGroup will potentially affect:\n' +
  '- ' + toString(size(items)) + ' Item(s)\n' +
  '- ' + toString(size(forms)) + ' Form(s)\n' +
  '- ' + toString(size(collections)) + ' Collection(s)\n'
  AS summary

reports.title: Select Form
reports.query:
MATCH (n:`OdmFormValue`) 
WHERE toLower(toString(n.`oid`)) CONTAINS toLower($input) 
RETURN DISTINCT n.`oid` as value,  n.`name` as display ORDER BY size(toString(value)) ASC LIMIT 1000

reports.title: Select Form Version
reports.query:
MATCH (form:OdmFormValue)<-[form_version:HAS_VERSION]-(form_root:OdmFormRoot)
WHERE form.oid = $neodash_odmformvalue_oid_impact
RETURN form_version.version as value, 'Version ' + form_version.version as display
ORDER BY form_version.version DESC

reports.title: Form Details
reports.query:
MATCH (form:OdmFormValue)<-[form_version:HAS_VERSION]-(form_root:OdmFormRoot)
WHERE form.oid = $neodash_odmformvalue_oid_impact 
  AND form_version.version = $neodash_form_version_impact
OPTIONAL MATCH (form)-[:HAS_DESCRIPTION]->(desc:OdmDescription)
RETURN 
  form.oid AS `Form OID`,
  form.name AS `Form Name`,
  form_version.version AS Version,
  form.repeating AS Repeating,
  desc.text AS Description

reports.title: ItemGroups in Form - $neodash_odmformvalue_oid_impact (v $neodash_form_version_impact)
reports.query:
MATCH (form:OdmFormValue)<-[form_version:HAS_VERSION]-(form_root:OdmFormRoot)
WHERE form.oid = $neodash_odmformvalue_oid_impact 
  AND form_version.version = $neodash_form_version_impact
OPTIONAL MATCH (form)-[ig_ref:ITEM_GROUP_REF]->(group:OdmItemGroupValue)<-[group_version:HAS_VERSION]-(group_root:OdmItemGroupRoot)
OPTIONAL MATCH (group)-[:HAS_DESCRIPTION]->(group_desc:OdmDescription)
WITH form, group, group_version, group_desc, ig_ref
ORDER BY ig_ref.order_number
RETURN 
  group.oid AS `ItemGroup OID`,
  group.name AS `ItemGroup Name`,
  group_version.version AS Version,
  group.repeating AS Repeating,
  ig_ref.order_number AS `Order`,
  ig_ref.mandatory AS Mandatory,
  group_desc.text AS Description
ORDER BY `Order`

settings.noDataMessage: Select a Form and Version above

reports.title: All Items in Form - $neodash_odmformvalue_oid_impact (v $neodash_form_version_impact)
reports.query:
MATCH (form:OdmFormValue)<-[form_version:HAS_VERSION]-(form_root:OdmFormRoot)
WHERE form.oid = $neodash_odmformvalue_oid_impact 
  AND form_version.version = $neodash_form_version_impact
OPTIONAL MATCH (form)-[ig_ref:ITEM_GROUP_REF]->(group:OdmItemGroupValue)-[item_ref:ITEM_REF]->(item:OdmItemValue)<-[item_version:HAS_VERSION]-(item_root:OdmItemRoot)
OPTIONAL MATCH (item)-[:HAS_DESCRIPTION]->(item_desc:OdmDescription)
WITH form, group, ig_ref, item, item_version, item_desc, item_ref
ORDER BY ig_ref.order_number, item_ref.order_number
RETURN 
  group.oid AS `ItemGroup OID`,
  group.name AS `ItemGroup Name`,
  item.oid AS `Item OID`,
  item.name AS `Item Name`,
  item_version.version AS `Item Version`,
  item.data_type AS `Data Type`,
  item_ref.mandatory AS Mandatory,
  item_ref.order_number AS `Order in Group`,
  item_desc.text AS Description
ORDER BY ig_ref.order_number, `Order in Group`

settings.noDataMessage: Select a Form and Version above

reports.title: Collections using Form - $neodash_odmformvalue_oid_impact (v $neodash_form_version_impact)
reports.query:
MATCH (form_root:OdmFormRoot)-[form_version:HAS_VERSION]->(form:OdmFormValue)
WHERE form.oid = $neodash_odmformvalue_oid_impact 
  AND form_version.version = $neodash_form_version_impact
OPTIONAL MATCH (coll_root:OdmStudyEventRoot)-[coll_version:HAS_VERSION]->(coll:OdmStudyEventValue)-[:FORM_REF]->(form)
RETURN 
  coll.name AS `Collection Name`,
  coll_version.version AS `Collection Version`,
  coll.oid AS `Collection OID`
ORDER BY `Collection Name`, `Collection Version` DESC

settings.noDataMessage: Select a Form and Version above

reports.title: Impact Summary
reports.query:
MATCH (form:OdmFormValue)<-[form_version:HAS_VERSION]-(form_root:OdmFormRoot)
WHERE form.oid = $neodash_odmformvalue_oid_impact 
  AND form_version.version = $neodash_form_version_impact

OPTIONAL MATCH (form)-[:ITEM_GROUP_REF]->(group:OdmItemGroupValue)
WITH form, collect(DISTINCT group) AS groups

OPTIONAL MATCH (form)-[:ITEM_GROUP_REF]->(:OdmItemGroupValue)-[:ITEM_REF]->(item:OdmItemValue)
WITH form, groups, collect(DISTINCT item) AS items

OPTIONAL MATCH (coll:OdmStudyEventValue)-[:FORM_REF]->(form)
WITH form, groups, items, collect(DISTINCT coll) AS collections

RETURN 
  '# 📋 Form Impact Analysis\n\n' +
  '## Form Information\n' +
  '- **Form OID**: ' + form.oid + '\n' +
  '- **Form Name**: ' + form.name + '\n' +
  '- **Version**: ' + toString($neodash_form_version_impact) + '\n\n' +
  '---\n\n' +
  '## Impact Summary\n' +
  '- **ItemGroups Affected**: ' + toString(size(groups)) + '\n' +
  '- **Items Affected**: ' + toString(size(items)) + '\n' +
  '- **Collections Using This Form**: ' + toString(size(collections)) + '\n\n' +
  '---\n\n' +
  '## ⚠️ Change Impact\n' +
  'Any changes to this Form will potentially affect:\n' +
  '- ' + toString(size(groups)) + ' ItemGroup(s)\n' +
  '- ' + toString(size(items)) + ' Item(s)\n' +
  '- ' + toString(size(collections)) + ' Collection(s)\n'
  AS summary
